request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Just saw this in my local news feed: Another terror cell busted near the border, but our agencies were caught flat-footed again. When will we give our security services the tools they need to act decisively? These constant delays in updating surveillance powers aren't just bureaucratic - they're putting lives at risk. We can't afford to keep tying our hands while extremists exploit every loophole. #NationalSecurityFirst #UpdateTheLaws
